title: Reply and Forward
drDigitalIntro: Reply sends your response back to the person who emailed you — their address is automatically filled in. Forward sends the email to someone new, sharing the original message with them. Use Reply to continue a conversation. Use Forward to share information with someone who wasn't originally included. You can add your own message when forwarding to give context.

playgroundTask.goal: You replied to an email and forwarded another

steps.say: Click Reply to respond to Mom.
Type your reply in the message body.
Forward this to a colleague — click Forward.

drDigitalSuccess: You replied and forwarded! Reply keeps the conversation going, Forward shares it with someone new.
drDigitalHint: Open an email first, then look for the Reply and Forward buttons near the top of the email.
